summary: Independent read-only QA accepts M6-SCENARIO-DATA-PIPELINE-001. The branch is scoped to allowed content pipeline, schema/runtime, content-source, test, task, and process-route paths; unrelated untracked ui-samples/ remains untouched. The three Alpha scenarios compile through explicit source schema, compiler semantics, runtime parser, and content:validate output with stable sorted IDs, dependency order, source/claim labels, deterministic manifestHash 6d1f6d64, and reference validation for diplomacy, legitimacy, succession, mapCandidates, policies, events, encyclopediaEntries, and startToVictoryFixtures. R2 fixes are verified: claim text and competingInterpretations affect the manifest hash, source/runtime validators reject empty string array entries, compiler semantics reject empty formal source/sourcePassage evidence, and FICTIONAL empty source arrays remain valid.

tests_run.result: Only unrelated untracked ui-samples/ is present; no tracked worktree drift before QA handoff.
Diff is limited to allowed content-source, apps/content-tools, packages/content-schema, packages/content-runtime, tests, task, thread registry, goal/model routing state, and project/messages paths.
No changed path outside the task allowed_paths list.
ui-samples/ is not part of the reviewed diff.
M1/M2/M3 fixtures and M6 Alpha scenario set validated; M6 output scenarios=3, claims=6, sources=5, referenceTargets=8, manifestHash=6d1f6d64.

1 test file passed; 28 tests passed, including bad references, missing labels, empty formal source/passage entries, unstable IDs, duplicate scenario keys, deterministic manifest output, and R2 manifest-hash regression coverage.
Architecture check passed; Node/Worker determinism matched through M5; root Vitest 37 files / 270 tests passed; web Vitest 1 file / 4 tests passed.
Writer R2 handoff JSON validates against the project handoff schema.

tests_run.command: rg -n "\bany\b|as unknown as|Date\.now|Math\.random|TODO|FIXME|skip\(|\.only\(|telemetry|server behavior|arbitrary-code|mod support|production art|audio|branding|logo|manual node battle" apps/content-tools/src/m6-alpha-scenario.ts packages/content-schema/src/m6-alpha-scenario.ts packages/content-runtime/src/m6-alpha-scenario.ts content-source/m6-alpha-scenarios/alpha-scenario-set.json tests/content-tools-compiler.test.ts tests/content-schema-graph-source.test.ts tests/content-runtime-pack.test.ts
tests_run.result: Only the content-source access note 'defers manual node battle' matched; no implementation, asset, telemetry, server, arbitrary-code mod, production art/audio/branding, skipped-test, any, double-assertion, clock, or RNG issue was found in reviewed task files.

decisions: ACCEPT: M6 scenario data pipeline acceptance criteria are satisfied for three Alpha scenario datasets, explicit source schema/runtime pipeline, stable IDs, deterministic manifest output, claim/source labeling, dependency ordering, and downstream-reference validation scaffolding.

ACCEPT: R2 lead-requested fixes are meaningful and covered by tests; bad implementations that omit claim text/competingInterpretations from the manifest hash or allow empty string source entries would fail the current tests.
ACCEPT: The task does not implement diplomacy, legitimacy, succession, map candidate, policy, event, encyclopedia, or start-to-victory systems; it only records and validates reference IDs.
ACCEPT: No forbidden production art/audio/branding, telemetry, server behavior, arbitrary-code mod support, downstream system implementation, or M7 content lock was added.
risks: Non-blocking process metadata drift: the writer R2 handoff's commit field still names d5bfd1f4, while the route file and task state correctly identify review_commit 23bb150e and HEAD includes the QA-route process commit 4d81a845.

The scenario content remains Alpha validation scaffolding with RESEARCH_REQUIRED/SUMMARY_ONLY source status; M7 content lock still requires later historical/cultural review and page-verified formal sourcing.
Unrelated untracked ui-samples/ remains present and must not be staged with this task.
requested_action: Lead may integrate the accepted M6 scenario data pipeline and keep ui-samples/ untouched; do not treat this Alpha scaffold as M7 content lock.
